description.value: Point at a creature within close range and whisper a message. Target (and only target) hears the message and can whisper a reply that only you hear. Weave transmits through most barriers but is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, thin sheet of lead, or 3 feet of wood.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = fails
- 1 = one-way message only
- 2 = full effect
- 3 = medium range (60ft)
---
system.weavingRoll: Air Potential + Air Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
